product_overview: Mobile app to help households track pantry inventory, low-stock alerts, shopping lists and household spending, with optional camera-based AI item/receipt analysis and offline data persistence.
core_goals: Allow users to create an account and join or create a household to share inventory and spending data.
Provide an inventory system to add, update, delete and scan items, with low-stock alerts and shopping list integration.
Provide a spending tracker that logs receipts, extracts totals via AI OCR, and shows monthly spend.
Support camera-based AI analysis to speed adding inventory items and extracting receipt data.
Ensure usable offline behavior via persisted cache and register device push tokens for notifications.

features.name: User Sign In
features.description: Authenticate users using email and password so they can access household data and app features.
user_flows: Navigate to /sign-in -> Enter email address -> Enter password -> Submit login form -> Navigate to /(tabs)/index on success
Navigate to /sign-in -> Leave email or password blank -> Submit login form -> See validation error on empty fields
Navigate to /sign-in -> Enter email address -> Enter wrong password -> Submit login form -> See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: User Sign Up
features.description: Create a new account with display name, email and password, then proceed to household setup.
user_flows: Navigate to /sign-up -> Enter display name -> Enter email address -> Enter password -> Confirm password -> Submit account creation form -> Navigate to /household on success
Navigate to /sign-up -> Enter display name -> Enter email address -> Enter password -> Enter non-matching confirm password -> Submit account creation form -> See error if passwords do not match
Navigate to /sign-up -> Enter email already in use -> Submit account creation form -> See account-exists or signup error message

features.name: Create or Join Household
features.description: After account creation or first sign-in, allow users to create a new household or join an existing household by invite code so data is shared with household members.
user_flows: Navigate to /household -> Enter household name to create -> Submit create household form -> Profile is updated and user proceeds to /(tabs)/index
Navigate to /household -> Enter invite code for existing household -> Submit join request -> See household joined confirmation and proceed to /(tabs)/index
Navigate to /household -> Enter invalid or expired invite code -> Submit join request -> See error indicating invite code is invalid

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Home screen showing greeting, weekly/monthly spend summary, low-stock alerts and a shopping list preview to surface immediate household needs.
user_flows: Navigate to /(tabs)/index -> See greeting with user name -> See item count, low stock count and monthly spend stats -> View low stock inventory alerts -> Mark a shopping list item as complete -> See updated shopping list preview
Navigate to /(tabs)/index -> See shopping list preview -> Open full shopping list modal -> Mark multiple items complete -> See shopping list update reflected in dashboard
Navigate to /(tabs)/index -> Backend returns error or no data -> See empty or error state and option to retry

features.name: Inventory Management
features.description: Browse household inventory, add new items, update stock/thresholds, delete items and filter by category so household stock is accurate.
user_flows: Navigate to /(tabs)/inventory -> See list of inventory items with stock bars -> Filter items by category -> Open add item form -> Enter item name, category, stock level and threshold -> Submit form to add item -> See new item in inventory list
Navigate to /(tabs)/inventory -> Select item -> Open update stock form -> Enter new stock level -> Submit stock update -> See updated stock reflected in list
Navigate to /(tabs)/inventory -> Open add item form -> Leave required fields empty -> Submit form -> See validation error on missing fields
Navigate to /(tabs)/inventory -> Attempt to delete item -> Confirm deletion -> See item removed from list

features.name: AI Camera Scanning (Inventory)
features.description: Use the device camera or gallery to capture images of pantry/room and get AI-identified items to quickly add to inventory.
user_flows: Navigate to /(tabs)/inventory -> Open camera inventory modal -> Take a photo or pick a gallery image -> Wait for AI analysis -> Review list of identified items -> Toggle items to select -> Add selected items to inventory -> See newly added items in list

Navigate to /(tabs)/inventory -> Open camera inventory modal -> Pick a photo -> Wait for AI analysis -> AI returns low-confidence or no results -> See message indicating analysis failed and option to retry or add item manually
Navigate to /(tabs)/inventory -> Open barcode scan modal -> Scan barcode -> Receive item lookup result -> Confirm to add or update inventory -> See item added or updated in list

features.name: Spending Tracker
features.description: Log household spending entries manually or via receipt scan and view monthly spending history and totals.
user_flows: Navigate to /(tabs)/spending -> See list of spending entries for current month and total monthly spend -> Open add spending form -> Enter store name, amount, category and date -> Submit form to add spending -> See new entry in list and updated total

Navigate to /(tabs)/spending -> Open receipt scan modal -> Take a photo or pick a receipt image -> Wait for AI extraction -> Review AI-extracted store name and total amount -> Confirm to add spending entry -> See entry added to list

Navigate to /(tabs)/spending -> Open receipt scan modal -> Upload blurry or unreadable receipt -> Wait for AI extraction -> AI fails to extract totals -> See extraction error and option to enter details manually

features.name: Receipt OCR Scanning
features.description: Extract store name, line items and total amounts from receipt photos to accelerate adding spending entries.
user_flows: Navigate to /(tabs)/spending -> Open receipt scan modal -> Take photo or pick receipt from gallery -> Wait for AI analysis -> Review extracted store and total -> Confirm to add spending entry -> See spending entry created
Navigate to /(tabs)/spending -> Open receipt scan modal -> Submit receipt image while offline or with network error -> See error indicating analysis failed and option to retry or enter data manually

features.name: Offline Data Persistence
features.description: Persist query cache so users can view previously loaded inventory and spending data when offline and refresh when connectivity returns.
user_flows: Open app while offline -> Navigate to /(tabs)/index or /(tabs)/inventory -> See previously loaded data from cache displayed locally -> Continue to interact with cached views

Open app while offline -> Navigate to /(tabs)/spending with no cached data -> See empty state with a message indicating offline and option to retry when online -> Restore network -> Data automatically refreshes and populates views

features.name: Push Notification Registration
features.description: Request notification permissions on device first launch after sign-in and store the Expo push token in the user profile for future household notifications.
user_flows: Navigate to /(tabs)/index after sign-in -> System notification permission prompt appears -> Grant permission -> App stores Expo push token in profile and confirms registration

Navigate to /(tabs)/index after sign-in -> System notification permission prompt appears -> Deny permission -> App records that notifications are disabled and shows instructions to enable permissions later

routes.description: Create or join a household after first sign-in
Bottom tab navigator shell (Dashboard, Inventory, Spending, Meals)
Dashboard - weekly spend, low stock alerts, shopping list preview
Full inventory list with add/edit/delete and camera scanning
Monthly spending log with receipt scanning

known_limitations.issue: Meals tab is a placeholder screen with no backend integration
known_limitations.impact: No meal planning functionality yet; page is empty

known_limitations.issue: RoomScanWizard state variables (draftItems, checkedItems, imageUris) may have inconsistencies from recent refactor
known_limitations.impact: Room scan wizard may have runtime errors when reviewing identified items

known_limitations.issue: Supabase Edge Function analyze-image has Deno type warnings in TypeScript IDE but works correctly when deployed
known_limitations.impact: No runtime impact; IDE shows false type errors for Deno globals
